hours.answer: We are open Monday to Saturday, from 9 AM to 5 PM. We are closed on Sundays.

booking_methods.answer: You can book by calling our voice assistant, using our website chat, or calling us directly.

customer_id_info.answer: Your Customer ID (format CUST001) helps us access your records instantly. New patients receive one after their first appointment.

booking_window.answer: You can book appointments up to 3 days in advance from today.

services.answer: We offer: General Dental Checkup, Tooth Filling, Root Canal Treatment, Braces and Teeth Alignment, Gum Treatment and Scaling, Crowns Bridges and Dentures, Tooth Extraction, Pediatric Dental Care, Dental X-rays, and Oral Disease Evaluation.

appointment_duration.answer: Standard appointments are 10 minutes. Complex procedures may require a longer slot.

reschedule_cancel_faq.answer: Just tell me your name, phone number, and current appointment date and time — I will handle the rest.

booking_info.answer: New patients need name, phone, preferred date and time, and reason for visit. Existing patients need their Customer ID.

forgot_id.answer: No problem! Give me your name and phone number and I will look up your records.

late_cancellation.answer: No penalty, but we appreciate at least 24 hours notice so the slot can go to another patient.

pediatric.answer: Yes! We have a pediatric specialist for child-friendly treatments.

xray_records.answer: Yes, you can request copies of your X-ray records and dental history. Ask via the assistant or contact us directly.

doctors_staff.answer: Our clinic has experienced general dentists, a pediatric specialist, and orthodontic professionals — all licensed.

insurance.answer: Yes, we accept major insurance policies. Please bring your insurance card during your visit for verification.

location_parking.answer: Please visit our website or call us for our address. Parking is available near the clinic.

emergency.answer: For dental emergencies, call us immediately. We do our best to accommodate urgent cases quickly.

cost_fees.answer: Treatment costs vary by procedure. Visit us for a consultation and we will give you a detailed estimate.

checkup_frequency.answer: Visit every 6 months for a routine check-up and cleaning, even if you have no pain.

treatment_pain.answer: Most modern dental treatments are nearly painless thanks to local anesthesia and advanced techniques.

bleeding_gums.answer: Bleeding gums may indicate gingivitis. A check-up and cleaning can help significantly.

brushing_time.answer: Brush for at least 2 minutes twice daily with a soft-bristled toothbrush and fluoride toothpaste.

tooth_decay.answer: Tooth decay happens when bacteria produce acids from sugar, damaging the tooth enamel.

flossing.answer: Yes — flossing removes food and plaque between teeth where a toothbrush cannot reach.

tooth_pain_advice.answer: Rinse with warm water and see a dentist immediately. Avoid self-medication.

xray_safety.answer: Yes — dental X-rays use very low radiation and are safe when taken only when necessary.

bad_breath.answer: Brush twice daily, floss, clean your tongue, drink water, and get regular dental cleanings.

good_foods.answer: Calcium-rich foods like milk, cheese, fruits, vegetables, and nuts help maintain strong teeth.

prompts.patient_type: Are you a new or existing patient?
prompts.customer_id: Please tell me your customer ID, for example CUST001.
prompts.name: What is your full name?
prompts.date: What date would you like to come in?
prompts.time: What time works best for you?
prompts.reason: What is the reason for your visit?
prompts.new_date: What is the new date for your appointment?
prompts.new_time: What is the new time for your appointment?

system_messages.welcome: Hello! Welcome to Smile Dental. How can I help you today?
system_messages.did_not_catch: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you please repeat?
system_messages.unknown_error: I'm sorry, something went wrong. Could you please repeat that?
system_messages.help_options: I can help you book, reschedule, or cancel an appointment. What would you like to do?
system_messages.id_not_found: I couldn't find that ID. Are you a new patient, or please try a different ID?
system_messages.confirm_booking: Just to confirm booking for {name} on {date} at {time} for {reason}. Say yes to confirm or no to change.
system_messages.slot_taken: That time slot is already taken. Please choose a different time.
system_messages.past_date: That date is in the past. Please choose a future date.
system_messages.advanced_booking_limit: We only accept bookings up to 3 days in advance.
system_messages.closed_biz_hours: We are open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 5 PM. Please choose another slot.
system_messages.appointment_cancelled: Your appointment on {date} has been cancelled. Is there anything else?
system_messages.appointment_booked: Your appointment is booked! Your customer ID is {cid}. We will see you on {date} at {time}. Is there anything else?
system_messages.appointment_rescheduled: Rescheduled! Your new appointment is on {date} at {time}. Anything else?
system_messages.appointment_not_found: I could not find your existing appointment. Please check the date.
system_messages.no_appointments: No upcoming appointments found for your account.
system_messages.how_else_help: How else can I help you?
system_messages.booking_error: Sorry, I could not complete the booking. Please try again.
system_messages.reschedule_error: Sorry, I could not reschedule. Please try again.
system_messages.cancel_error: Sorry, I could not cancel. Please try again.
system_messages.view_error: Sorry, I could not retrieve your appointments.
